texto: If only the physical aspects of hatha yoga are used, it is called ghatastha yoga (ghata means “physical effort”). Modern expressions like “fitness yoga” and “power yoga” that flourish within gym classes are within the same category, even if they do not derive from the original exercises’ rhythm and succession. In many instances “power yoga” has a positive effect on physical health; but if there is no aim to ease the mind, to gain self-insight and control of your thoughts, and to experience the divine within you and within the universe, the deeper meaning of yoga and - possibly life - is lost.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Stig Åvall Severinsen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. texto: The more you believe in the power of thought, and the more you listen to your breath, the greater changes you can create in your life.
explicacao: Citação de Stig Åvall Severinsen sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The more you believe in the power of thought, and the more you listen to your breath, the greater…” articula reflexao, breath, breatheology em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e breatheology.
